GitHub Sprint Report Mockup

Burndown Chart — Sprint Milestone

Example burndown chart for your Agile final project sprint. This shows a 2-week sprint with 16 total story points, an ideal burn line, and an actual burn based on your simulated sprint progress.
Milestone: Sprint Duration: 2 weeks Total Story Points: 16 Stories in Sprint: 4
Ideal burn
Actual remaining
Suggested submission use: Open this file in Chrome, zoom to 100% or 125%, and take a screenshot. This is styled to look polished and readable for Task 10: submit the burndown chart for the sprint or milestone.
